item.title: OC comic reposts- help me pay emergency vet bills
item.description:
Everyone always jokes “there’s no way it was just alcohol” but as a reminder friends ✨ autism ✨ (it was basically a stim for me). The glow sticks were luckily the non toxic ones but they stained the shit out of my clothes and skin as they lost their glow.
I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories. I posted the last three days about my dog needing help and so many of you rallied around us and generated funds and upvotes for exposure. He had to have two separate emergency surgeries totaling $13,000. We don’t even know if he will make it. The vets had us optimistic which is why we proceeded to save his life, but we got an update it’s about 50/50 now as he just got of his second surgery. we have about 10k of the 12k vet bills covered, we are almost to the full amount. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. —————- Original post details: We need help. On May 11th, at 11:30 pm, our beloved German Shepherd, Atreyu, had his stomach flip; Gastric Dilatation Volvulus (GDV). This is an emergency and life-threatening situation in which a dog with this condition has on average two hours to live. That night, while feeding my foster kitten, I checked on Atreyu, who had seemed slightly off the hour before. His abdomen had swelled up to three or four times the size it should be. I knew instantly his stomach had flipped and he was nearing death. Freddie was able to speed to the Veterinary ER Hospital and get there in just enough time for them to perform the first life-saving surgery. Unfortunately though he needed another surgery (yesterday) and it didn’t go the way they planned. He has about 50/50 chance of making it. We have a small amount in our savings but we are not able to afford the full amount. Any help from our friends and family or even fans of the comics, to help pay towards these two emergency surgeries would be desperately and greatly appreciated. I know we are not the only ones tight on money in this economy so please know, no matter what amount you can pay/or upvote this post, if you are able to help us we are forever thankful for anything you can do. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc https://www.paypal.me/KristieLaneK
we are maxed out on our vet bills and are going no further. I hate to say it, but the vets were not very honest with us about the price of things, they gave us two quotes for two emergency surgeries and ended up going over them by double the amount each. I pray Atreyu makes it. He’s on ice as he has a fever, it’s still 50/50 but there’s not much else we can do. I am just so eternally thankful for the strangers on the Internet, no, my family on Imgur, who have allowed us to at least try to give him a second chance. We’ve been crying nonstop. Thank you all from the bottom of our hearts.
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: A whole new world!
item.description: Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C62AUiCSB30/ Safe for work and safe for your ears. Hai Imgurian, you too have a piece of my heart! Thank you for the Accolade. And I hope you have someone that can elevate you in your life!✨ Oh Imgurian forever will you have a piece of my heart! Thank you for the Accolade and may you always rise to any occasion that comes your way!✨ Aye aye yai! Imgurian what are you doing to me?! Of course you have a piece of my heart! Please enjoy this Friday Eve with ppl that will never leave you high and dry! Thank you for the Accolade!✨ Woof! I have never had so much pizza at once! It's gonna make me fat.... Thank you Imgurian! May you always have a special someone that can reach the stuff on the top shelf!✨ Welp Imgurian, lucky for me I don't get tired of pizza or acknowledging how much I appreciate your Accolade! I will always wish you a tall, strong, loving person in your life that appreciates all that you do!✨ All right all right all right Imgurian! I don't think it's a fib to say I once was a short order cook that made pizzas, but I had to move on to bigger and better things. And that's what I wish for you, to find the best people for you life. Thank you for the Accolade!✨ Lord there is sooooo much pizza.... Am I am so happy for it Imgurian. I never feel like I get the short end of the stick! Thank you for the Accolade and do not ever think you are beneath anyone's notice you are awesome!✨ Oooo a Gem Imgurian! Shine on you crazy diamond.... And thank you for the Accolade! A great Friday's Eve is upon you!✨ I don't think I can get enough Gems Imgurian.... Small, tall, large or short, they all shine with a beauty all their own, just like you! Thank you for the Accolade✨ No no nope! I must disagree Imgurian. I am merely a purveyor (as noted by some) of the finest 'IG spam', Suitable for your delectation. In sooth, it is you to whom simply the best belongs! Thank you for the Accolade!✨ Sadly Imgurian, I do not feel original but I am proud to serve those who are original (such as your fine self!) I am only a conduit for these reels to pass through.... Please enjoy Friday's Eve with someone whose joie de vivre matches yours!✨ Whew! Imgurian, it's been a day and I love the Mind Blowing Accolade! I hope that you can have someone in you life that's sooo good that your mind will be blown too! Thank you for the Accolade!✨ Oh Imgurian, it's all fun and games till you can't reach anything amiright? And that's when the entertainment begins! I truly hope you have someone that complements you height and your worth! .....And get to all those hard to reach areas! Have a great night!✨ Oof Imgurian, I am getting a little bloated.... But I'm not giving up! These pizzas empower and push me up to new heights! I hope you to have a special someone that'll prop you up and keep you motivated. Thank you for the Accolade!✨ Am I not entertained?! YES INDEED, thanks to you Imgurian and your Accolade! I know when Friday comes (ahem), you are gonna have an epic weekend. There might not be auroras, but you won't need 'em!✨ Nay nay! Simply not true, my fair Imgurian! You are simply the best and I am but a humble poster of erudite reels, memes and occasional shit post. Thank you and I bid you a fine Friday Eve.✨ By the stars Imgurian! You snuck up on me. The best you say? Oh my no. But good news everybody! You are! I am rubber and you are glue, No take backsies! Thank you for the Accolade, but please have a fantastic weekend in lieu of a bad one!✨ ** Hey y'all! This is not me, but a fresh reel from the finest IG reels. Sorry if you are disappointed!***

item.title: Time for another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
practical
absolutely
made me what I am today
glad i don't have an apple watch
i'm having trouble with the first part of that sentence
crazy how far custom character creation has evolved
the good stuff
mmm hmm
it's certainly not the best
yours, someone else's (with consent).... just touch one
sorry gang
matt damon
we're on to you, Frank
i will take any chance to post Command & Conquer content
lip syncing is easy. i would make them sing
glory days
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Random Stolen Meme Dumpp
item.description: FP Edit: Thank you and enjoy the rest of your week! As always, if you want learn how you can use your CPU/GPU power to help scientists develop new medicines then check out Folding@home: “Install our software to become a citizen scientist and contribute your compute power to help fight global health threats like COVID19, Alzheimer’s Disease, and cancer. Our software is completely free, easy to install, and safe to use.” - www.foldingathome.org Do your part and join up now!

item.dc:creator: ReposterCallerOuterMan

item.title: This time it wasn't pills.
item.description: Needed some time to share this. I got the call from my dad on March 22nd that she hung herself in the bathroom. He found her that morning but it was too late. The police and EMTs were there while I talked with him through sobs. My brother and I flew out to be with him as soon as we could. Dad's a wreck. Feels massive guilt. He's gotten a lot better in the weeks since, but he's still really down on himself. We've got him focusing on his own health (mental and physical) as a distraction, but also because we don't want to lose him too. (to a fall or something). He's on his own now, and he's never been super social, so he doesn't have a strong friend-base to keep him occupied/comforted/supported. Lots of change happening in this new world without her. Dad wants to move but doesn't know where. Not really sure what else to mention, there's just so much. For those reading this with parents you love, call them. Now. Tell them how much they mean to you. For those experiencing depression, anxiety, please let people help you. Reaching out can be the hardest part but you need to know the world is better with you in it. Nothing good comes from leaving. You're not a burden, and things will be okay. Just don't leave. [EDIT] Front Page. Okay.. Thank you for all the encouraging words. It's actually really helpful to read through the comments, I'll post responses when I can, probably here-and-there. For all: I'm in therapy. I have a psychiatrist. I'm doing okay. My feelings on the matter sway from sadness to anger to acceptance and back through all that again. It's kind of a cycle that won't stop, but it doesn't overwhelm (anymore). [Copied from one of my responses below, maybe it'll help others] My therapist helped me visualize grief as imagining a large ball in a box, and on each wall of the box is a button, and when that button is pressed, you feel that pain. When the ball is so big, any jostle can hit a button. Over time the ball gets smaller and smaller so the ball doesn't always hit them, but when a button is pressed it still hurts as much. Thanks again. Sorry if this post was a little heavy for some to read. For me, I was ready to share it, and in doing so, I feel a little better/seen and maybe a little more able to accept this life without her.
item.dc:creator: DrFighterpilotAttorneyAtLaw

item.title: I thought I was straight... Turns out I'm gay!
item.description:
Been doing HRT for about half a year now (Started last November), and I feel so much better about myself! Still trying to open up little by little about being trans (Still scared to dress up in public but have been successful on the few occasions I have), but all of my friends have been so supportive! My parents have been surprisingly cool too, even if they don't 100% understand. Sorry for the selfies, but I think this sort of post is fair game?
Cat Tax Most Viral Edit: Holy Smokes you guys! I never expected this to blow up! Thank you guys for showing all this love and support! People like you guys make it easier for people like me to keep going down the path I want to go! Never thought I would get this far... Idk... send cute stuff? Maybe some friends?
item.dc:creator: Gazune

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
